allow: PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\('localhost',3000\); Write-Host "Server OK on port 3000"; $tcp.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Host "Server not running" })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name powershell | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq "" } | Select-Object Id, CPU, StartTime | Sort-Object StartTime)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 76548 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:/Users/531/Desktop/九萬畝/server.ps1" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; Write-Host "Server restarted")
